title: Clubul Computer
text:
Clubul Computer
    A community-driven tech club. Learn, build, and share — all ages, all levels.
  



  
    What we do
    Six programs for every interest and skill level.
    
      WorkshopsPython, web dev, JavaScript — beginner to advanced.Schedule
      Tech TalksIndustry speakers on open source, AI ethics, cybersecurity.Browse talks
      Junior ClubGame dev, robot programming, and digital storytelling for ages 8-14.Learn more
      Hardware HackingArduino, Raspberry Pi, IoT devices, and 3D printing.See projects
      Open SourceFind projects, understand codebases, make real contributions.Join session
      Project IncubatorTurn your idea into reality with mentorship and resources.Submit idea
    
  



  
    
      
      
        Technology foreveryone.
        No fees. No requirements. Just show up. Whether you're 8 or 80, a complete beginner or a senior developer — Clubul Computer is your space to learn, experiment, and connect with people who share your curiosity.
        Visit clubul.computer
      
    
  



  
    
      
      
        Real projects.Real impact.
        Our members build educational tools used in 150+ Romanian schools, deploy air quality sensors across cities, and contribute to open-source projects used worldwide. This isn't a classroom — it's a launchpad.
        See community projects
      
    
  



  
    
      150+Schools reached
      5000+Students
      25IoT sensors deployed
      0Membership fee
    
  



  
    Find us
    
    
      Main location: Craiova, Romania
      Satellite meetups: Bucharest (quarterly) + Online
      Email: social@clubul.computer
      When: Last Thursday of every month
    
  



  
    
    Join the club
    Show up to a meetup or reach out online. That's it.
    
      Visit clubul.computer
      Book a call
